subcodes.first_line: O you who are firm in the Covenant! I have not written to you for some time now; this is due only to the numerous preoccupations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان چندیست که مکاتبه ننمودم و این مجرد از کثرت مشاغل و غوائل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
